dj_text: BLAST OFF! What is Love (Bardcore | Medieval Style with Vocals - Original by Cornelius Link) was Incredible and System of a Down - Toxicity - Medieval Style - Bardcore will be LEGENDARY! And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: We interrupt this broadcast to bring you... nothing. We just wanted your attention. Carry on.
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
